name: Chocolate Shots
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter in a large bowl of electric mixer at high speed until creamy, about 1 minute.
2. Add sugar and vanilla; beat until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes.
3. Gradually beat in flour and baking soda until smooth. Stir in oats.
4. Refrigerate dough in the mixer bowl for 10 minutes for easier handling.
5. Remove dough from refrigerator. Divide into 2 to 3 equal pieces.
6. Roll each piece into a log about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
7. Pour sprinkles into a pie plate and roll logs in sprinkles to coat evenly.
8. Wrap logs in plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
9. Preheat oven to 325°F.
10. Cut dough into 1/4-inch slices and place on a greased baking sheet.
11. Bake until lightly browned and slightly firm to the touch, about 20 minutes.
12. Remove from oven and transfer to a cooling rack.
